evidence: "This is a must see if you are into thrillers and mysteries."
"I love found footage horror films and this Halloween season, I've watched a lot of them."
"I was wrong. I am so impressed, surprised and just plain overwhelmed by this film."
"I jumped, I screamed and I yelled at my TV."
"I feel that they could have transferred it better for bluray quality."
"If it wasn't for the horrid acting, this film MIGHT have been really good."
"I am a HUGE fan of the first film and have told literally everyone I know to watch it."
"I am a huge William Petersen and Jorja Fox fan."
"This is just gloriously wonderful and I am pleased to say that this works great in my dvd player."
"I was shocked at how good it was."
"I'm telling everyone in my movie & tv group on Facebook to watch it."
"I hope we have many more seasons of Lore to enjoy!"

summary: The user has a strong preference for thrillers and horror, particularly found footage films, and enjoys fast-paced narratives that evoke strong emotional responses. They show a moderate sensitivity to production quality and have a notable loyalty to specific films and actors.
